title: AEP v1.1 A3 Operator Directive Cue
description: v1.1 A3 amendment (STRONGLY PLAUSIBLE × CONTEXT-BOUND PATTERN). Two-agent convergence (visual-judge + strategist). Verbatim operator reactions indexed as RegexicalCues with polarity. Honors sec73.2 operator-verbatim-sacred + sec73.6 NO-OPERATOR-REACTION-CALIBRATION (the cue records the reaction; it does NOT instruct on what to do about it). Composes_with: v1.0.3 RegexicalCue (this is a specialized cue type), sec73.2/.6.

verbatim_text.description: Operator's verbatim utterance. sec73.2 binding: NEVER paraphrased.

polarity.description: Classified polarity of the reaction. Cue-author tags this at capture time.

surface.description: sec70.1 surface where the directive surfaced.

bound_to_lesson_id.description: Optional. Lesson the cue is bound into.

regexical_cue_id.description: Optional. RegexicalCue id this directive cue resolves through (v1.0.3 cue layer).

downstream_actions_triggered.description: Downstream actions taken in response to this directive. Anti-reaction-laundering (sec73.6): record what was DONE, not what is INFERRED to have been wanted.

operator_attestation_signature.description: Optional Ed25519 signature attesting the verbatim text is exact. Base64url-encoded.

examples.verbatim_text: okay great now implement it all, and at the end, measure every possible % or variable that each thing as an aep whole provides the agentic framework if everything is not perfect, then make it perfect for v1.1 do whatever you have to do i honestly don't see how any of you have limits anymore - just figure it out
